sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69679" key="nakokle/y" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νᾰκο-κλέψ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fleece-stealer</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:246" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.246</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
